models.commentarySession: A saved commentary session with video reference, personality used, and timestamped commentary entries
models.commentaryEntry: A single commentary line with timestamp and the generated text

relationships: Each commentary session has many commentary entries ordered by timestamp
Each session references the personality that was used to generate the commentary

entries.text: And down goes Murphy! That's not a basketball move, that's a cartoon slip! Someone get this man a banana peel!
Did you see that crossover? The defender fell over like a folding chair!
Three points! That ball went in smoother than butter on a hot skillet!
And that's the buzzer! What a finish — he dunked so hard the rim is still vibrating!

The formation here is a classic 4-4-2, with both wingers hugging the touchline to stretch the opposition's back line. Notice how the central midfielder drops deep to receive the ball — this is the first phase of build-up play.

Excellent through-ball! The striker times his run perfectly to stay onside. This is the classic 'pass and move' principle that managers like Guardiola and Klopp emphasize — the ball moves faster than any defender can react.

Goal! And what a finish — placed precisely into the far corner where the keeper can't reach. The expected goals (xG) value for that chance was 0.78, well above the threshold for a high-probability finish.
Well. That serve certainly traveled... eventually. One assumes the ball was aiming for the service box, but it appears to have had other plans.

And that's the match. The player celebrated as though he'd just discovered fire, rather than simply returning a tennis ball over a net. Remarkable enthusiasm for a sport that largely involves standing still.
What fantastic effort from this young player! Did you see the technique they're working on? That's exactly the right approach — keep your eye on the ball, great form!
Beautiful fielding! Look at that footwork — nice and balanced, ready for the throw. Every practice is building this player's confidence and skills!
And that's the inning! Great job by the whole team on communication. I love seeing players calling out to each other — that's how you build as a team!
OH MY GOODNESS! DID YOU SEE THAT INCREDIBLE PLAY?! The reflexes on this player are UNBELIEVABLE! We are WITNESSING HISTORY folks!
WHAT A CLUTCH MOMENT! The crowd is going WILD! This is the stuff of LEGENDS! INCREDIBLE!!!
AND THAT'S THE VICTORY! CHAMPIONS! They've done it! The trophy is THEIRS! UNBELIEVABLE SCENES!!!
